arts.ttl: Return to Everton an 'absolute whirlwind' - Moyes
arts.sum: Everton head coach David Moyes says his return to Goodison Park has been a "whirlwind" as he suffers a 0-1 defeat against Aston Villa in his first game back in charge.

arts.ttl: Hits and misses: Moyes must find way to solve Ndiaye puzzle at Everton
arts.sum: The problem emerging, however, in this wretched run of five goals in 11 league games - nine of which Everton haven't scored in - is that Ndiaye has looked like he's been operating in a parallel universe to his team-mates. No player made more tackles for Arsenal (4), won possession more times (6) and had a higher passing accuracy (93.8 per cent) than Lewis-Skelly as the statistics backed up the visuals.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa complete £20m January transfer after Unai Emery decision
arts.sum: Earlier this month, Emery admitted that a loan move was one option for Philogene, since he believes in his potential, but the club was happy to accept the offer which Ipswich presented. Villa held a ‘matching rights’ option and triggered that clause when Ipswich Town saw an £18m bid accepted in July.

arts.ttl: What Everton supporter shouted says everything with David Moyes facing problem he spent millions on
arts.sum: Everton match verdict after Aston Villa triumph 1-0 at Goodison Park in David Moyes return as manager

Aston Villa can confirm Jaden Philogene has joined Ipswich Town for an undisclosed fee. The winger, an Academy graduate, made a total of 21 senior appearances in all competitions across two spells with the club. Philogene enjoyed his first-team debut for Villa in 2021 and spent time on loan at Stoke City and Cardiff City before joining Hull City on a permanent deal in 2023, later returning to Villa Park in July 2024. Everyone at Aston Villa would like to thank Jaden for his service to the club and wish him all the very best in his future career.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery gives Ollie Watkins verdict as Aston Villa striker selected ahead of Jhon Duran
arts.sum: "Ollie always responds on the field, sometimes not with goals but always with his work," Emery said after the win over Everton. Unai Emery hailed Ollie Watkins after he scored the winning goal for Aston Villa at Goodison Park on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Moyes admits Everton need to add quality in transfer window
arts.sum: David Moyes has said it is ‘really important’ that Everton ‘add quality’ to the squad in the January transfer window. Moyes’s return to the Everton dugout ended in defeat on Wednesday night, as Aston Villa claimed a 1-0 win at Goodison Park. Ollie Watkins scored the only goal of the game as Everton again failed […] The post Moyes admits Everton need to add quality in transfer window first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins on target as Aston Villa wreck Moyes’ Everton homecoming
arts.sum: The second coming of David Moyes confirmed the new Everton manager is no miracle worker. But how they could do with one. Everton drew a blank for the ninth time in 11 Premier League games as Aston Villa, too savvy and assured for a relegation‑threatened opponent, ensured there would be no new managerial bounce at Goodison Park. Ollie Watkins struck the only goal of a tight contest to give Unai Emery’s side a merited win and condemn Everton to a third league defeat in succession. Dominic Calvert-Lewin had a glorious chance to level in the 93rd minute but blazed over from Jesper Lindstrøm’s inviting cross. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Everton 0-1 Aston Villa: Highlights, man of the match, stats as David Moyes suffers defeat in first Premier League match as boss
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at the highlights, man of the match, and stats from Wednesday's Premier League clash between Everton and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: David Moyes response spoke volumes as Everton task laid bare in brutal fashion
arts.sum: Everton fans responded to David Moyes' return but he's just found out how hard his job at Everton will be
